creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/548778> a thought from carlavilla@ re: some of the web resources that might be added under Support. 

----

In addition to what's suggested in the forum: 

> … StackOverflow, ServerFault, …

* these currently appear under Community i.e. 
  <https://www.freebsd.org/community/>

* have them, instead, in the support area  
  <https://www.freebsd.org/support/webresources/>. 

Stack Exchange excels for answers to technical questions, however it is emphatically not a place for chattiness. 

From <https://meta.stackexchange.com/a/298420/166799>, for example: 

> 🔘 no longer needed – This comment is obsolete, 
>                       chatty, or otherwise unnecessary. 

Support; not community :-)
